overview: A walkthrough playbook builder that analyzes screenshots of any web application, identifies the platform, and generates beautiful visual step-by-step guides for any task you describe.
features: Screenshot upload with drag-and-drop and paste support
AI-powered platform detection from uploaded images
Step-by-step playbook generation from a task goal description
Visual playbook display with numbered cards and icons per step
Save playbooks with unique shareable links
Playbook library showing all generated guides
